# Phase 3: Testing

**Status:** In Progress
**File:** `phases/phase_3_testing.md`

---

## Detailed Objective

Write comprehensive tests for all API endpoints and services.

## Acceptance Gates

- [ ] Gate 1: Test coverage above 80%.
- [ ] Gate 2: All tests pass in CI.

## Tasks

### [ ] 1 Write Unit Tests

  - [ ] 1.1 Test user service methods.
  - [ ] 1.2 Test admin service methods.

### [ ] 2 Write Integration Tests

  - [ ] 2.1 Test endpoint responses with test database.
  - [ ] 2.2 Test authentication flow end-to-end.

### [x] 3 Write Performance Tests

  - [ ] 3.1 Benchmark API response times under load.
  - [ ] 3.2 Test concurrent request handling.

### [ ] 4 Set Up CI Pipeline

  - [ ] 4.1 Configure test runner in CI.
  - [ ] 4.2 Add coverage reporting.
